🎮 World Cup Quest — Sprite Viewer

Pick who should be Tommy, Maddy, opponents, and the keeper.
Toon characters are side-view and much more expressive — recommended!

👧 Female Person

Option for Maddy — bright, sporty, casual

🧗 Female Adventurer

Option for Maddy — more action-hero style

👦 Male Person

Option for Tommy — casual, kid-friendly

🧗 Male Adventurer

Option for Tommy — more action-hero style

🤖 Robot

Option for opponents / keeper — fun and clearly "not human"

🧟 Zombie

Option for opponents / keeper — spooky villain energy!

⬇️ Original Top-Down Kenney Sprites (Blue team)

These are the ones currently in the game — top-down view, limited animation
